problem: Why does quantum superposition collapse — can decoherence be prevented at scale?
mechanism: Resonant inductive coupling for wireless power
hypothesis: Why does quantum superposition collapse — can decoherence be prevented at scale? remains unsolved because previous research missed the role of Resonant. Resonant inductive coupling for wireless power directly addresses this.
